memory_recovered: The authoritative append-only queue corpus can be enumerated directly from one immutable git tree, eliminating caller-selected subsets and preventing uncommitted or later files from contaminating historical reconciliation.
observed: M-010 implemented a fail-closed reconciliation gate but still depended on caller-supplied discovered paths and parsed records.
git ls-tree can enumerate every committed operations/queue-updates JSON path at one resolved commit.
git show and git rev-parse <commit>:<path> can retrieve the record and its blob identity from that same commit.
inferred: Commit-native discovery closes the omission gap between repository history and the effective queue gate input manifest.
Historical queue reconstruction remains stable even after later commits because all reads are scoped to one resolved commit SHA.
proposed: Invoke the discovery runner in CI and before autonomous queue selection, writing operations/effective-queue.json only when the gate accepts the full committed corpus.
superseded: Caller-supplied queue-update path lists as authoritative corpus discovery.
Reading uncommitted working-tree queue records during historical reconciliation.
unresolved: CI wiring is not yet committed.
The production repository corpus was not executed in this connector run because no checked-out repository was exposed to the runtime.

verification.result: 3 passed, 0 failed in an isolated temporary git repository
cases: all committed queue updates are discovered and blob-bound to one commit
uncommitted queue files are excluded from HEAD reconciliation
a historical commit remains stable after later queue commits

falsification_route: Add an uncommitted queue file and confirm it is absent from the discovered corpus.
Add a later committed queue file and confirm an earlier source commit still yields the original corpus.
Corrupt one committed update and confirm the downstream effective queue gate rejects the corpus.
